description: Sample volume scan for centring or crystal detection
title: VolumeScanData

rotationAngles.description: List of omega offsets from the starting omega position to use for volume scan, in degrees
rotationAngles.title: RotationAngles

searchVolume.description: Volume to search (input), including motor positions to use
searchVolume.title: Search Volume

boundingBoxSize.description: The size of the bounding box to scan in microscope coordinate system (horizontal, vertical, beam). The bounding box is centred on the intersection between the omega axis and the beam.
boundingBoxSize.title: Bounding Box Size

boundingBoxShape.description: The shape of the bounding box used.
boundingBoxShape.title: Bounding Box Shape

resultVolume.description: Volume of all active points found
resultVolume.title: Result Volume
